ham.subject: Ticket #12345 – Completed: Merge Request Approved
ham.body:
Hi Team,

Just a quick update on the Jira ticket #12345 that was assigned to me. I have reviewed the code changes, run the unit tests, and everything looks good. The merge request has been approved and merged into the main branch.

Key points:
- All tests passed locally and in CI.
- No conflicts were found.
- Updated the documentation in the README.

If anyone needs to review the changes or has questions, feel free to comment on the merge request or ping me here.

Thanks,
Anjali

spam.subject: Urgent: Payroll Update Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Employee,

This is an automated notification from the HR Payroll Department. Your payroll details have been flagged for verification. Failure to update your bank account information by 5:00 PM today will result in your salary being placed on hold.

To verify your account, please click on the following link and complete the quick form:
<URL>

For any queries, contact the HR Helpdesk at 0123-456-7890 or email hr-help@company.com.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Best regards,
HR Payroll Team
